verses.text: Kei tawh a kiho vantung mi mah hong paikik a, a ihmu kimlai a kiphong bang keekin kei hong khanglosak hi

Amah in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Kham tawh a kibawl meivakkhuam khat ka mu hi. Tua meivakkhuam in meivak sagih nei a, meivaktui koihna ding hai khat zong a khuam dawnah om hi. Tua meivak sagihte in meivakkhau nei ciat uh hi
Meivakkhuam gei-ah oliv kung nih zong om a, meivakkhuam lang tuakah om uh hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi
Tua ciangin kei zong vantung mi kiangah, “Sia aw, hihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dot ciangin
amah in, “A cihnopna theilo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dawng a, kei zong, “Sia aw, ka thei kei hi,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi

Tua ciangin vantung mi in kei kiangah, “ Topa in Zerubbabel tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: Galkap tam neihna hang hilo, nangma vangliatna hang zong hilo, keima tung panin na ngah vangliatna bek tawh na ma na tun'zo ding hi
Thuhaksa pente nangawn in na ma hong khaktan zolo ding hi. Biakinn na lamkik ding a, mite in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi,’ ci-in a ot ngeingai laitakin a khupna suang na ciang ding hi, hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi
Amah in, “Zerubbabel in biakinn bulpi phut khin a, biakinn lam zong a zo ding hi. Tua ciangin ka mite in, amaute kiangah nang kong sawlna thu hong thei ding uh hi

A ma uh a telhloh manun ka mite lungkia uh a, ahi zongin Zerubbabel in biakinn lam nasep a makaihna a muh uh ciangin a lung uh damkik ding hi,” hong ci hi. Vantung mi in, “Meivak sagihte pen, leitung khempeuh a etna Topa' mittang sagih ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong ama kiangah, “Meivakkhuam pang tuaka om oliv kung nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam
Oliv thau a luan'khiatna kham tuizawl nihte' gei-a om oliv hiang nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi
Amah in, “Theilo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Sia aw, thei kei ing,” ci-in ka dawng hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Leitung khempeuh' Topa' na a sem dingin Pasian in teelin sathau a nilh mi nihte a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
